publishedAbstract: - While deleting a block volume from heketi and from openshift(pvc) facing below error. ~~~ E0729 10:11:51.406766 1 controller.go:1138] Deletion of volume "pvc-a29e3fb4-ad54-11e9-bb22-005056b74c27" failed: [heketi]: failed to delete glusterblock volume blockvol_256515f43ad0c914eae3e7bf309e15b9: block delete: blockvol_256515f43ad0c914eae3e7bf309e15b9: failed: Some of the nodes are down Nodes reachable: 192.168.X.224 192.168.X.225 Nodes down: 192.168.X.226 ~~~- It's not possible to delete manually: ~~~ # heketi-cli blockvolume delete e1755915887e9ca59d32b4320899ab81 Error: block delete: blockvol_e1755915887e9ca59d32b4320899ab81: failed: Some of the nodes are down Nodes reachable: 192.168.X.224 192.168.X.225 Nodes down: 192.168.X.226 Nodes down: 192.168.X.226 ~~~ **Where all nodes are up and online. All gluster peers are connected and are in cluster.**
publishedTitle: Getting error  "Some of the nodes are down"  while deleting/creating block volumes
